calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Chung 1994 Revocable Intervivos Trust, Dated February 15, 1994
Off Calendar Dec-23-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Vance Chang for and with Trustee, James Chung and his son.

The Court noted this matter is on to transfer 2 parcels to Christopher. Mr. Chang stated this petition would support his 850 Petition on an issue for a property held by the deceased settlor (wife). The Court noted that this should have been filed in case # 302208.

The Amended petition for modification of Chung 1994 Revocable Intervivos Trust, Dated February 15, 1994 is off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: C. Robles. Not reported.
